title: Property Tests, Algebraic Laws, and Pipeline Diagnostics · Changed-Stream Lab
summary: Prove a normalization and aggregation library across generated changed cases and injected faults. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a law-oriented regression and diagnostics suite with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate concrete examples from general properties and generate boundary-rich cases.
Test identity, associativity, idempotence, or round-trip laws only where contracts claim them.
Attach diagnostic taps at effect boundaries without changing transformed values.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from collections.abc import Callable, Iterable, Iterator
from functools import partial, reduce
from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar('T')
U = TypeVar('U')
